toxic_free_farming_desc: Prepare organic fertilizers and medicines at home in a very simple way and bring production costs to zero.
tip1_step1: Take a plastic bucket or earthen pot and fit a small tap at its bottom.
tip1_step2: Place a 3-inch layer of brick pieces and sand at the bottom of the vessel (for water filtration).
tip1_step3: Fill it with a 3-inch layer of semi-decomposed cow dung and wet organic waste.
tip1_step4: Release 50 to 100 earthworms into it and cover it with a gunny bag.
tip1_step5: Sprinkle light water daily on the top gunny bag (do not add too much water).
tip1_step6: In 15-20 days, the nutritious extract released from the earthworms' bodies will collect through the bucket's tap. This is Vermiwash!
tip1_step7: Usage: Mix 1 liter of vermiwash with 10 liters of water and spray on crops.
tip1_benefit2: Leaves get a dark green color and immunity increases.
tip2_step1: Take a 200-liter water barrel and fill it with 180 liters of water.
tip2_step2: Mix 10 kg of fresh cow dung and 10 liters of cow urine from a local breed.
tip2_step3: Add 2 kg of old jaggery and 2 kg of gram or chickpea flour (besan) to it.
tip2_step4: Add a handful of fertile soil from under a banyan or peepal tree to increase organic microbes.
tip2_step5: Stir this solution clockwise with a wooden stick for 2 minutes in the morning and evening.
tip2_step6: Cover the barrel with a gunny bag, keep it in the shade, and let it ferment for 5 to 7 days.
tip2_step7: In 7 days, highly powerful Jeevamrut will be ready.
tip2_step8: Usage: Apply 200 liters of Jeevamrut per acre through soil or drip irrigation.
tip2_benefit1: The population of beneficial soil microbes increases rapidly.
tip2_benefit2: Soil fertility improves and aeration is maintained.
tip3_step1: Add 5 kg of well-rotted old cow dung or vermicompost to 100 liters of water.
tip3_step2: Mix 1 kg of old black jaggery and 50 grams of Trichoderma bio-fungicide powder.
tip3_step3: Add 500 grams of dried neem leaf powder to this solution.
tip3_step4: Cover the solution with a gunny bag, leave it in the shade for 7 to 10 days, and stir once daily.
tip3_step5: In 10 days, dark black homemade humic acid and organic carbon solution will be ready.
tip3_step6: Usage: Take 500 ml of solution in a 15-liter pump and perform root drenching.
tip3_benefit1: Root length and nutrient absorption capacity increase tremendously.
tip3_benefit2: The level of Organic Carbon in the soil improves rapidly.
